input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

F.6.6.1 Frame Members of the Main Hoop Bracing Support system must be constructed of closed 
section tubing meeting F.3.2.1.i

final_answer: Frame Members of the Main Hoop Bracing Support system must be constructed of closed section tubing meeting F.3.2.1.i
